titleStmt.title: The Political Adviser in Japan ( Atcheson ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Political Adviser in Japan ( Atcheson ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Subject: Forwarding Copy of Petition for Restoration of Islands Belonging to Hokkaido.

The United States Political Adviser has the honor to refer to this Mission’s despatch no. 891 dated March 4, 1947,Not printed. and to previous correspondence regarding the return from Russian jurisdiction to Japanese jurisdiction of certain islands adjacent to Hokkaido, and to forward
a copy of the English text of a petition dated March 24, 1947,Not printed; similar petitions regarding the Habomai, Etorofu, and Kunashiri Islands were transmitted to the Department in despatches 1284, September 18, and 1311, October 2 (not printed). filed at this Headquarters by Honna Takeshi, representing the members of the House of Representatives from Hokkaido.
The petition requests the return of the following named islands of the Kurile Archipelago to Japanese jurisdiction:
The Islands of Southern Kuriles, i.e., Etorofu and Kunashiri.
